hero.badge: The Real Estate revolution powered by AI
hero.title: Find your home with <highlight>intelligence</highlight>
hero.subtitle: The only search engine that analyzes, verifies, and finds your ideal home using natural language. Forget complex filters.
hero.suggestion1: Apartment in Madrid with terrace under 300k
hero.suggestion2: Family house near schools in Valencia

features.semanticDesc: Stop searching with checkboxes. Talk to our search engine as if it were a real estate expert. It understands the context and nuances of your search.
features.antiFraudDesc: Our AI analyzes photos and prices to detect scams and fake listings. A trust score on every property for your safety.
features.marketDesc: Real price history and automatic valuation. Know if it's a good opportunity before anyone else with up-to-date data.

search.noResultsSearch: No properties found for your search. Try different terms.
search.noResultsFilter: No properties found with the selected filters.

filters.title: Filters
filters.minVerificationDesc: Only show properties with an authenticity score above {score}%

pricing.title: Find your home with <highlight>artificial intelligence</highlight>
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your needs. All plans include access to our anti-fraud verification technology.
pricing.successMsg: Subscription activated successfully! You can now enjoy all the features.
pricing.canceledMsg: The payment process was canceled. You can try again whenever you want.
pricing.planExplorerDesc: Discover the power of AI-driven property verification.
pricing.planAgencyDesc: Complete automation for real estate teams
pricing.faq1q: Can I change my plan at any time?
pricing.faq1a: Yes, you can upgrade or change your plan whenever you want. Changes are applied immediately and we adjust billing proportionally.
pricing.faq2q: What does AI fraud detection include?
pricing.faq2a: Our system analyzes images, descriptions, and prices to detect duplicate listings, fake photos, and suspicious prices. We show you an authenticity score from 0 to 100%.
pricing.faq3q: Do you offer a free trial of the Pro plan?
pricing.faq3a: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial of the Pro plan with no credit card required.
pricing.faq4q: How does the Agency plan work?
pricing.faq4a: The Agency plan includes API access, multiple users, and professional tools. Contact sales for a personalized demo.

social.autoPostDesc: Our AI agents can automatically post your properties when you create them. Content is generated and optimized for each platform.

impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.contentText: The contents of this website have been prepared with the utmost care. However, as this is a demo and portfolio project, all content is illustrative in nature and does not constitute professional real estate, legal, or any other type of advice.
impressum.contentText2: The property listings, prices, and data shown are fictitious or for demonstration purposes. They do not represent real offers for the purchase, sale, or rental of properties.
impressum.linksText: This website may contain links to external sites. We have no influence over the content of those pages and therefore assume no responsibility for them.
impressum.ipText: The source code, design, and contents of this portfolio project are the property of Limber Martinez, unless otherwise indicated. Reproduction, editing, or distribution without the express authorization of the author is prohibited.
impressum.dataText: For information about the processing of personal data, please refer to our
impressum.legalText: This legal notice is governed by German and European Union law, in particular:
impressum.legalBdsg: Bundesdatenschutzgesetz (BDSG) - German Federal Data Protection Act

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.s1Text: At InmoAI, we take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR/DSGVO) and applicable German and European legislation.
privacyPage.s2Intro: We may collect the following types of information:
privacyPage.s2Item2: Usage data: searches performed, properties visited, preferences
privacyPage.s2Item3: Technical data: IP address, browser type, device
privacyPage.s2Item4: Location data: approximate location based on IP (with consent)
privacyPage.s3Intro: We use your personal data to:
privacyPage.s3Item1: Provide and improve our search services
privacyPage.s3Item4: Communicate with you about your account or the service
privacyPage.s4Intro: We process your data based on:
privacyPage.s4Item2: The performance of a contract or requested service
privacyPage.s5Intro: We do not sell your personal data. We may share it with:
privacyPage.s5Item1: Service providers that help us operate the platform
privacyPage.s5Item3: Property advertisers when you request contact (with your consent)
privacyPage.s6Intro: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data, including:
privacyPage.s6Item2: Secure storage with encryption at rest
privacyPage.s7Item1: Access: request a copy of your data
privacyPage.s7Item3: Erasure: request the deletion of your data
privacyPage.s7Item4: Portability: receive your data in a structured format
privacyPage.s7Item5: Objection: object to processing for certain purposes
privacyPage.s7Item6: Restriction: restrict processing in certain cases
privacyPage.s7Contact: To exercise these rights, contact the project responsible at
privacyPage.s8Text: We retain your data only for as long as necessary for the purposes described. Inactive accounts are deleted after 2 years. Anonymized data for analysis may be retained indefinitely.
privacyPage.s9Text: Your data is primarily stored on servers within the European Union. If it is necessary to transfer them outside the EEA, we ensure adequate protections through European Commission standard contractual clauses.
privacyPage.s10Authority: You may also file a complaint with the competent data protection authority. In Germany:
privacyPage.s10AuthorityName: Landesbeauftragte für Datenschutz und Informationsfreiheit Nordrhein-Westfalen (LDI NRW)

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.s1Text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences and ensure the proper functioning of the platform.
cookiesPage.s2NecessaryDesc: Essential for the operation of the site. They do not require consent.
cookiesPage.s2FuncDesc: Allow us to remember your preferences and personalize your experience.
cookiesPage.s2AnalyticsText: We currently do not use analytics or marketing cookies. No tracking services such as Google Analytics, Google Ads, or Facebook Pixel are used in this version of the project.
cookiesPage.s4Intro: You can control cookies in several ways:
cookiesPage.s4Item1: Cookie banner: When visiting the site for the first time, you can accept the necessary cookies
cookiesPage.s4Item2: Browser settings: You can block or delete cookies from your browser settings
cookiesPage.s5Intro: Instructions for managing cookies in popular browsers:
cookiesPage.s5Chrome: Chrome: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies
cookiesPage.s5Firefox: Firefox: Options > Privacy and security > Cookies
cookiesPage.s5Edge: Edge: Settings > Cookies and site permissions
cookiesPage.s6Text: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes through the cookie banner or by email if you have an account.

termsPage.title: Terms and Conditions
termsPage.s1Text: By accessing and using InmoAI, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions of use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not access the service.
termsPage.s2Text: InmoAI is a portfolio project that demonstrates a real estate search platform powered by artificial intelligence. The service is intended solely for demonstration and technical evaluation purposes.
termsPage.s2Item1: Do not use the service for illegal or unauthorized purposes
termsPage.s2Item2: Do not attempt to access restricted areas of the platform
termsPage.s2Item3: Do not perform scraping or automated data extraction without authorization
termsPage.s2Item4: Do not publish false or misleading content
termsPage.s3Text: All content on InmoAI, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, icons, images, audio clips, digital downloads, and data compilations, is the property of Limber Martinez and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
termsPage.s4Text: To access certain features, you may create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
termsPage.s5Text: The property listings displayed on InmoAI are for demonstration purposes. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or currency of the data. Prices, locations, and features are illustrative and do not represent real offers.
termsPage.s6Text: As a portfolio/demo project, InmoAI shall not be liable for direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from the use or inability to use the service.
termsPage.s7Text: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue, temporarily or permanently, the service with or without notice. We shall not be liable to you or any third party for any modification, suspension, or discontinuation of the service.
termsPage.s8Text: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Germany and the European Union. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of Dortmund, Germany.
termsPage.s9Intro: If you have questions about these terms, you can contact us at:
